data.title: Apple's AI-Powered Future: iPhone Growth Surge By 2026 With New iPhone 17, AI Integration, Analyst Says
data.description: The Rosenblatt analyst reiterated a Buy rating on Apple with a target price of $261. Smartphone upgrade rates for Verizon, AT&T, and T-Mobile have declined, but analysts remain optimistic about future sales due to anticipated AI advancements.

Robinhood's Crypto Strategy Hits 'Sweet Spot' For Dominating Future Investment Landscape: Bernstein
data.description: Bernstein predicts Robinhood will lead in cryptocurrency investment, with young user base & asset-based revenue. Crypto market could reach $7.5T by 2025.
